records.ety: [L., bindweed, fr. convolvere to roll around. So named from its twining stems.]

defs: A large genus of plants having monopetalous flowers, including the common bindweed (Convolvulus arvensis), and formerly the morning-glory, but this is now transferred to the genus Ipomæa.
quotes: The luster of the long convolvuluses That coiled around the stately stems.
